publish.title: Publish plugin
publish.intro: Fill in the template, zip it, then upload. The SHA-256 checksum is computed in the browser for the selected file—no manual entry.
publish.introSkill: Fill in metadata, upload a PNG icon and your skill folder (must include SKILL.md at the root). We generate plugin.yaml for you and package it as a zip for upload.
publish.templateDownloadFailed: Could not get the template download link. Try again or contact an admin.
publish.templateHint: Download the template zip; edit as needed, then zip and upload.
publish.fieldSkillNameHelp: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only; must follow the skill slug rules, e.g. my-demo-skill.
publish.fieldSkillMetadataLockedHint: You linked an already published skill. Name, display name, description and tags match the live listing and cannot be edited here.
publish.fieldSkillDisplayNameHelp: Shown on the Hub list and detail pages.
publish.fieldSkillIconHelp: PNG only; written to icon.png at the package root.
publish.fieldSkillFolderHelp: Select a local folder (same layout as the template: SKILL.md at root; optional scripts, references, assets). Files are packed under a top folder matching the skill name.
publish.skillPackFailed: Packaging failed. Check fields and folder layout.
publish.skillErrorInvalidName: Invalid name: use a leading lowercase letter, then lowercase letters, digits or single hyphens between segments.
publish.skillErrorInvalidVersion: Version must be three numeric segments, e.g. 1.0.0 (optional leading v).
publish.skillErrorInvalidSkillDesc: Description exceeds the SKILL.md description limit.
publish.skillErrorInvalidTag: Empty tag found—remove extra commas or fill every tag.
publish.skillErrorInvalidAuthor: GitCode username missing. Please sign in again.
publish.skillErrorMissingRelativePath: Files lack relative paths—use a browser that supports folder upload (Chrome / Edge).
publish.skillErrorSkillMdNotAtRoot: SKILL.md must sit at the root of the selected folder (not nested).
publish.skillErrorMissingSkillMd: SKILL.md is missing at the folder root.
publish.skillErrorIconNotPng: Icon must be a valid PNG file.
publish.skillErrorTooManyEntries: Too many files in the package.
publish.checksumHint: Computed automatically after you pick a file (sent as X-Checksum-SHA256). Re-select the file if you change the zip.
publish.checksumHintSkill: After the form and folder are ready, the zip is built and hashed automatically (X-Checksum-SHA256). Any change triggers a rebuild.
publish.checksumPlaceholder: 64-char lowercase hex appears after you choose a zip
publish.hashFailed: Could not compute checksum. Try another file or browser.
publish.fieldPluginIdHelp: Choose “New plugin” for a first publish (plugin_id assigned by the server). Pick a listed plugin to publish a new version of it.
publish.fieldPluginIdHelpSkill: Choose “New skill” for a first publish. Pick a listed skill to publish a new version.
publish.fieldVersionHelp: e.g. 1.0.0; if empty, the version from the package is used.
publish.fieldVersionSkillHelp: Written to plugin.yaml; must be semver-like, e.g. 1.0.0.
publish.uploadFailed: Publish failed. Check the package and try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your GitCode account. If you are already signed in on gitcode.com, authorization usually completes immediately.
login.hintGitcodeSession: Session and access tokens are managed by GitCode. We do not store passwords or maintain refresh tokens.
